---
title: "FDA HW3"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r}
# ============================================================
# GM weekly log-returns ~ Toyota + Ford
# ============================================================

dat <- read.table("w_logret_3automanu.txt", header = TRUE, sep = "\t",
                  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
dat$Date <- as.Date(dat$Date, format = "%m/%d/%Y")

cat("=== Data summary ===\n")
str(dat)
print(summary(dat[, c("Toyota","Ford","GM")]))
cat("\nN obs:", nrow(dat), "\n\n")

# ---- Fit model ----
fit <- lm(GM ~ Toyota + Ford, data = dat)

cat("\n=== Model summary ===\n")
print(summary(fit))

cat("\n=== ANOVA ===\n")
print(anova(fit))

cat("\n=== Confidence intervals (95%) ===\n")
print(confint(fit))

# ---- Diagnostics ----
cat("\n=== VIF (multicollinearity) ===\n")
# manual VIF (avoid needing 'car' package)
vif_manual <- function(model) {
  mm <- model.matrix(model)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  vifs <- sapply(colnames(mm), function(cn) {
    others <- setdiff(colnames(mm), cn)
    r2 <- summary(lm(mm[, cn] ~ mm[, others]))$r.squared
    1 / (1 - r2)
  })
  vifs
}
print(vif_manual(fit))

cat("\n=== Durbin-Watson (autocorrelation) - manual calc ===\n")
res <- resid(fit)
dw <- sum(diff(res)^2) / sum(res^2)
cat("DW statistic:", round(dw, 4), "(2 = no autocorrelation)\n")

cat("\n=== Breusch-Pagan test (heteroskedasticity) - manual ===\n")
bp_aux <- lm(res^2 ~ dat$Toyota + dat$Ford)
bp_stat <- nrow(dat) * summary(bp_aux)$r.squared
bp_p <- 1 - pchisq(bp_stat, df = 2)
cat("BP statistic:", round(bp_stat,4), " p-value:", round(bp_p,4), "\n")

cat("\n=== Shapiro-Wilk normality test on residuals ===\n")
print(shapiro.test(res))

cat("\n=== Influential points (Cook's distance > 4/n) ===\n")
cooksd <- cooks.distance(fit)
thresh <- 4 / nrow(dat)
infl_idx <- which(cooksd > thresh)
cat("Number flagged:", length(infl_idx), "out of", nrow(dat), "\n")
print(head(dat[infl_idx, c("Date","Toyota","Ford","GM")][order(-cooksd[infl_idx]),], 10))

# ---- Save diagnostic plots ----
png("diagnostics.png", width = 1000, height = 1000, res =120)
par(mfrow = c(2,2))
plot(fit)
dev.off()

png("scatter.png", width = 1100, height = 500, res =120)
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
plot(dat$Toyota, dat$GM, xlab = "Toyota weekly log-return", ylab = "GM weekly log-return",
     main = "GM vs Toyota", pch = 20, col = rgb(0,0,0,0.4))
abline(lm(GM ~ Toyota, data = dat), col = "red", lwd = 2)
plot(dat$Ford, dat$GM, xlab = "Ford weekly log-return", ylab = "GM weekly log-return",
     main = "GM vs Ford", pch = 20, col = rgb(0,0,0,0.4))
abline(lm(GM ~ Ford, data = dat), col = "red", lwd = 2)
dev.off()

cat("\nDone.\n")


```
